textByHash.09995bd35be9ba9a74abba893d677228af753959: A miner without a clue - how funny!
textByHash.14b631b979641f32d99b8af36eecea30ece657ad: He left in a hurry one day; something in the shaft scared him to death, but he didn't say what.
textByHash.199d3e046190501238e545e8f191033d7b41417e: Of course, don't let me keep you.
textByHash.253fb9897986a813aaacd39e41ed9bee668be955: Rumour has it he'd been writing a book on his chemical mixture. I'm not sure what goes in it but I'm sure you'll find the stuff he was using scattered around the digsite. He left so quickly he didn't take anything with
textByHash.3c3e6a3e800201592ee5b92b5894449c070fa9b3: Indeed, you must be someone special to be allowed down here.
textByHash.42b9e66a93fffbab5ce296302122754944b2c01b: Well, hello again. Congratulations on your finds.
textByHash.4bf223027dc732caa071e3a797c4c3261150f394: There used to be this chap that worked in the other shaft. He was working on an explosive chemical mixture to be used for clearing blocked areas underground.
textByHash.55c3170ccbea1e73070c075851440b3461e557d4: Hmmm, let me think... Nope, can't help you there I'm afraid.
textByHash.5a8dbb09c098f5a5f35fae0ae8ae8a82adf83ed6: him. In fact, I still have a chest key he gave me to look after; perhaps it's more useful to you.
textByHash.99ff2a3a27e0a7c7ddb5eafa2fa110763c1a8eef: Hey! Trying to steal from me are you? What do you think I am, stupid or something?!
textByHash.ada969683ab0e317ba3cd5fbaa2cd4e7e09755db: Well, well... I have a visitor. What are you doing here?
textByHash.e314ca5cb2d3be696586e61c223cdfaaedac7766: Oh, well, don't forget that wealth and riches aren't everything.
